questions.q: In April 2026, President Trump officially nominated Dr. Erica Schwartz, a former Coast Guard doctor, to serve as the new director of which federal health agency?
options: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
questions.correctText: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)

questions.q: According to a recent CDC warning, which highly contagious, life-threatening virus that causes severe vomiting and diarrhea in young children is currently circulating at unusually high levels in the U.S.?
HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. faced a harsh grilling from Congress in mid-April 2026 over proposed cuts to the health budget and his controversial policies regarding what public health measure?
A newly released report from Senate Democrats revealed that pharmaceutical companies raised prices on hundreds of medications despite pricing deals previously touted by which politician?
President Trump is expected to sign an executive order urging more federal research into which psychedelic compound, known for its use abroad to treat PTSD and opioid withdrawal?
